# MarxMatrix

MarxMatrix is a Vietnamese evidence-led learning workspace for examining the political economy of technology. Calculations are deterministic, extracted evidence requires human review, and Copilot claims must retain page-level citations.

## Product surfaces

- [Method and limits](/#method)
- [Scanner](/scanner)
- [Capital Arena](/arena)
- [Copilot](/copilot)
- [Account access](/login)

Synthetic examples on the public landing page are educational fixtures, not financial advice or replacements for course materials.
